label: Japan, c.1918
caption: Michiko as a young child in traditional kimono. The inscription reads 大正七年 — Taisho 7, 1918.

label: With her mother, Haru (Haruko)
caption: Young Michiko with her mother Haru (Haruko) — a tender early portrait, both in kimono.

label: Formal portrait, c.1923
caption: A composed studio portrait. The inscription reads 大正十二年 — 1923.

label: Teenage years
caption: A luminous teenage portrait — already the poise of a performer.

label: At the piano, early years
caption: Michiko stands beside an upright piano — her instrument and lifelong companion.

label: Painted portrait
caption: A painted likeness of Michiko at the piano, rendered in charcoal and ink.

label: Young woman, c.1928
caption: Michiko as a young woman. Inscription: 昭和三年 — Showa 3, 1928.

label: Paris — baptism portrait, c.1939
caption: Michiko photographed in Paris, wearing a veil and crucifix — baptised in Paris just before the war broke out.

label: Paris — studying under Nadia Boulanger
caption: Michiko in Paris during her studies at the École Normale de Musique under Nadia Boulanger.

label: With Vladimir Ussachevsky, Columbia-Princeton EMC, 1956
caption: Michiko with Vladimir Ussachevsky at the Columbia-Princeton Electronic Music Center, 1956. She was the first woman ever invited to work here.

label: With her father, Sutezo Toyama
caption: Michiko with her father Sutezo Toyama — seated together on a floral sofa with their dog.

label: With her brother, Osamu
caption: Michiko with her brother Osamu — a formal studio portrait, likely before her departure for Paris.

label: On stage, KNAB grand piano
caption: Michiko performing on stage — alone at a concert grand piano, captured from the audience.

label: Departing for Europe, Nov 1932
caption: On the ship's deck. Inscription: 昭和七年十一月、神戸の諏訪丸にて — November 1932, aboard the Suwa-maru, Kobe.

label: With her mother, Haru (Haruko)
caption: Michiko (standing) with her mother Haru (Haruko) — a formal studio portrait in kimono, taken before her departure for Paris.

label: Post-concert gathering
caption: Post-concert — students with bouquets alongside a Western pianist, likely Henri Gil-Marchex.

label: A musician at the keys
caption: A pianist at the grand piano — Michiko observing in the background.

label: At the piano
caption: Michiko at the keys, glancing back — composed and present.

label: Henri Gil-Marchex atelier, Osaka Hamadera
caption: Group photograph at the atelier, Osaka Hamadera.

label: From her 1971 ICA Budapest paper
caption: A page from her 1971 paper at the 7th International Congress on Acoustics, Budapest.

label: From her 1983 acoustic research paper
caption: A page from her 1983 ARMA model paper — spectral analysis of Shakuhachi tones.
